text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: vg

Log:
  - Update to 10.0.7
  - fixes for incorrect ZFS fs name in jcoldmigrate
  - jail start via taskd
  - bhyve: support for VM auto start
  - bhyve: add virtio RNG for FreeBSD 10.1+
